name: Obvious Phishing - Homograph URL
message: URGENT: Your PayPal account has been suspended. Verify immediately: http://paypa1.tk/verify-account

name: Phishing - Credential Request
message: Your account will be suspended unless you verify your password and username immediately. Click here to confirm your identity.

name: Phishing - Prize Scam
message: Congratulations! You have won $1,000,000 in the Amazon lottery. Click to claim your prize now: http://amaz0n-prize.ml/claim

name: Phishing - Urgent Financial
message: Your bank account has been suspended due to suspicious activity. Verify your payment information immediately to avoid permanent closure.

name: Phishing - IP-based URL
message: Important security update required. Please login here: http://192.168.1.100/secure-login

name: Phishing - Brand in Subdomain
message: Dear customer, your Netflix subscription will expire. Renew now: http://netflix.verify-payment.com/renew

name: Suspicious - Generic Greeting + Action
message: Dear Customer, we noticed unusual activity on your account. Please verify your information to continue using our services.

name: Suspicious - Shortened URL
message: Check out this amazing offer: http://bit.ly/xyz123. Limited time only!

name: Benign - Normal Work Email
message: Hi Sarah, just following up on our meeting yesterday. Can you send me the project timeline when you get a chance? Thanks, John

name: Benign - Personal Message
message: Hey! Want to grab coffee this weekend? Let me know what works for you. Looking forward to catching up!

name: Benign - Legitimate Company Update
message: Hello John Smith, your order #12345 has been shipped and will arrive in 2-3 business days. Track your package at https://www.amazon.com/track

name: Benign - Newsletter
message: This week's tech news: New iPhone announced, AI developments continue. Read more in our weekly newsletter.

name: Phishing - Inheritance Scam
message: Dear beneficiary, you have inherited $5 million from a deceased relative. To claim, send your bank details and processing fee of $500.

name: Phishing - Password Reset Urgency
message: Your password will expire today! Reset it now or your account will be permanently locked: http://google-reset.cf/password

name: Suspicious - Multiple Exclamations
message: AMAZING DEAL!!! LIMITED TIME ONLY!!! Click now for 90% discount!!! Don't miss out!!!

name: Benign - Support Ticket Response
message: Thank you for contacting support. Your ticket #789 has been assigned to our team. We'll respond within 24 hours.

name: Phishing - Typosquat Domain
message: Dear user, confirm your Microsoft account credentials to prevent suspension: http://micros0ft-verify.com/login

name: Benign - Meeting Invitation
message: You're invited to the team meeting on Friday at 2 PM. Meeting link: https://zoom.us/j/123456789. Please confirm your attendance.

name: Phishing - Suspicious TLD + Urgency
message: Your Apple ID has been locked. Unlock immediately: http://apple-unlock.tk or lose access forever

name: Benign - Appointment Reminder
message: Reminder: You have a dentist appointment tomorrow at 10 AM. Reply CONFIRM to keep or CANCEL to reschedule.
